targets.rawSql: WITH conns AS ( SELECT json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') AS src, json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') AS dst FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ) SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT ip) AS BIGINT) AS value FROM ( SELECT src AS ip FROM conns UNION SELECT dst AS ip FROM conns )
SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) AS value FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT CAST(SUM(COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(raw, '$.orig_bytes') AS BIGINT), 0) + COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(raw, '$.resp_bytes') AS BIGINT), 0)) AS BIGINT) AS value FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) AS value FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') AS src, json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') AS dst FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) )

WITH conns AS ( SELECT json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') AS src, json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') AS dst FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND CASE WHEN '${view_mode}' = 'Internal Only' THEN (json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '192.168.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '10.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '172.16.%') AND (json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '192.168.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '10.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '172.16.%') ELSE TRUE END ) SELECT src as device, count(DISTINCT dst) as unique_destinations, count(*) as total_connections FROM conns LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.ip = src GROUP BY src HAVING count(*) >= ${min_conns} ORDER BY unique_destinations DESC LIMIT 15

WITH conns AS ( SELECT json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') AS src, json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') AS dst FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND CASE WHEN '${view_mode}' = 'Internal Only' THEN (json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '192.168.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '10.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '172.16.%') AND (json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '192.168.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '10.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '172.16.%') ELSE TRUE END ) SELECT dst as destination, count(DISTINCT src) as unique_sources, count(*) as total_connections FROM conns LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.ip = dst LEFT JOIN external_ips e ON e.ip = dst GROUP BY dst HAVING count(*) >= ${min_conns} ORDER BY unique_sources DESC LIMIT 15

WITH raw_conns AS ( SELECT json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') AS src, json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') AS dst, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(raw, '$.orig_bytes') AS BIGINT), 0) + COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(raw, '$.resp_bytes') AS BIGINT), 0) AS total_bytes FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND CASE WHEN '${view_mode}' = 'Internal Only' THEN (json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '192.168.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '10.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') LIKE '172.16.%') AND (json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '192.168.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '10.%' OR json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') LIKE '172.16.%') ELSE TRUE END ) SELECT src || ' -> ' || dst as pair, count(*) as connections, CAST(sum(total_bytes) AS BIGINT) as bytes FROM raw_conns GROUP BY src, dst HAVING count(*) >= ${min_conns} ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 20

WITH raw_conns AS ( SELECT json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.orig_h"') AS src_ip, json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_h"') AS dst_ip, json_extract_string(raw, '$."id.resp_p"') AS dst_port, json_extract_string(raw, '$.service') AS service, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(raw, '$.orig_bytes') AS BIGINT), 0) + COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(raw, '$.resp_bytes') AS BIGINT), 0) AS total_bytes FROM events WHERE source_tool='zeek' AND log_type='conn' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ) SELECT rc.src_ip, CASE WHEN ${show_manufacturer} = 1 THEN COALESCE(ds.manufacturer, '') ELSE '***' END AS src_manufacturer, rc.dst_ip, CASE WHEN ${show_manufacturer} = 1 THEN COALESCE(dd.manufacturer, ei.country, '') ELSE COALESCE(ei.country, '***') END AS dst_info, CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) AS connections, CAST(SUM(rc.total_bytes) AS BIGINT) AS bytes, MODE(COALESCE(rc.service, rc.dst_port)) AS top_service FROM raw_conns rc LEFT JOIN devices ds ON ds.ip = rc.src_ip LEFT JOIN devices dd ON dd.ip = rc.dst_ip LEFT JOIN external_ips ei ON ei.ip = rc.dst_ip GROUP BY rc.src_ip, ds.manufacturer, rc.dst_ip, dd.manufacturer, ei.country ORDER BY connections DESC LIMIT 50
